---
title: "Iba1_analysis"
author: "Erika Carlson"
format: html
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## ImageJ Analysis of Iba1

Particle analysis reference: <https://imagej.net/imaging/particle-analysis>
- Consider using Nucleus Counter
- Use macro from MGDt5

## Code

```{r}
#| echo: false

```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
